intelium.options.title: Intelium
intelium.options.enable.tooltip: Master switch for Intel GPU optimizations. Disable to fall back to vanilla Sodium behavior.
intelium.options.profile.tooltip: Max FPS favors peak frame rate (fewer chunk workers). Smooth favors stable frame times while moving and turning (more chunk workers). Balanced is the middle ground.
intelium.options.chunk_workers.tooltip: Number of CPU threads building chunks. 'Auto' picks a generation- and profile-aware value that lets chunks keep up while moving without starving the render thread.
intelium.options.fast_chunks.tooltip: Makes chunks appear faster by overriding Sodium's defer mode (which defaults to the slowest 'Always') and boosting build throughput. Fast = one-frame delay (recommended). Turbo = zero delay (fastest; may cost some smoothness when lots of terrain streams in). Off = leave Sodium's setting.
intelium.options.tune_frame.tooltip: Master switch for the per-frame tweaks below (entity distance, particles, shadows, biome blend). Your original values are restored when turned off.
intelium.options.entity_distance.tooltip: Caps how far entities render, as a percent of your setting. Lower culls distant mobs/items sooner - a real FPS win in crowded areas. 'Full' leaves it untouched.
intelium.options.limit_particles.tooltip: Caps particles to 'Decreased' while active (never overrides a stricter setting). Fewer particles means less overdraw on weak iGPUs.
intelium.options.disable_shadows.tooltip: Turns off the round shadows under entities. A small, cheap overdraw saving.
intelium.options.fast_biome_blend.toolti: Forces biome blending to 0. Biome blending runs on the chunk-build thread, so turning it off makes meshing much cheaper and cuts hitches when chunks stream in while you move.
intelium.options.supported_gpus.tooltip: Show the full list of supported Intel GPU generations, oldest to newest.
intelium.options.overlay.tooltip: Show a movable on-screen panel with live FPS and the measured FPS gain from Intelium.
intelium.options.overlay_compact.tooltip: Show only the title and FPS lines, hiding the benchmark and status lines.
intelium.options.overlay_lows.tooltip: Add a line showing the 1% low and minimum FPS over the last few seconds - a measure of stutter.
intelium.options.overlay_edit.tooltip: Open edit mode: drag the overlay to reposition it and run the A/B benchmark.
intelium.hud.title: Intelium FPS Test
intelium.edit.title: Intelium Overlay — Edit
intelium.edit.hint: Drag the panel to move it. Position saves automatically.
intelium.gpus.title: Supported Intel GPUs
intelium.gpus.heading: Supported generations (oldest to newest):
intelium.disabled.nvidia: NVIDIA GPU detected - Intelium is for Intel GPUs only. Use Nvidium instead.
intelium.disabled.amd: AMD GPU detected - Intelium is for Intel GPUs only.
intelium.disabled.unknown_gpu: Unknown GPU vendor - Intelium requires Intel.
intelium.disabled.unrecognized_intel: Intel GPU not recognized - staying out of the way to avoid instability.
intelium.disabled.too_old: Intel GPU is older than HD Graphics 520 (Gen 9 / Skylake). Sodium baseline will be used.
intelium.disabled.sodium_missing: Sodium not loaded - Intelium cannot run without Sodium.
intelium.disabled.incompatible_sodium: Unsupported Sodium version - Intelium disabled. Sodium runs unmodified.
